name: Venezuelan Peppers with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 ea Chili Pepper, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and julienne cut the red bell peppers.
2. Peel and chop garlic cloves into 1/4-inch pieces.
3. Cut shrimp in half lengthwise and discard veins; set aside.
4. In a deep heavy skillet, combine 2 cups olive oil with pepper strips and heat slowly until tender but not browned (oil will turn rose color). Remove peppers.
5. Add remaining oil to another skillet with garlic; cook gently for 4-5 minutes until garlic is tender and golden. Strain garlic pieces out of oil.
6. Return peppers to the skillet and add minced chili pepper. Cook shrimp in oil until pink and cooked through.
7. Serve peppers and oil with shrimp atop slices of bread, which are soaked in oil and topped with peppers and garlic (optional feta cheese).
